title: Plan-Pattern Binding
description: Binds a plan (or a step within a plan) to a deterministic code-pattern from the pattern library. The binding is loaded by the planning service when rendering the plan; it does NOT modify the plan definition itself (additive only per AGENTS.md).

plan_id.description: ID of the plan this binding attaches to.

pattern_id.description: ID of the pattern from pattern.schema.v1.json this binding resolves.

step_id.description: Optional plan step ID to scope the binding. Null/omitted means 'applies to whole plan'.

parameters.description: Parameter map passed to the pattern's render step. Free-form; the pattern's own parameter schema validates this at render time.

enabled.description: Master enable switch. Disabled bindings resolve to None.

fail_open.description: If true, a render failure degrades to a warning and lets the plan proceed without the pattern. Default false (fail-closed).

dry_run.description: If true, the binding is resolved and logged but the rendered output is not committed. Default false.

result_artifacts.description: Logical names of artifacts the binding is expected to produce (e.g. 'python_source_file', 'workflow_definition').
